positive: Minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a majestic celestial creature – a soaring griffin or celestial phoenix hybrid – rendered in a modern tattoo art style. The griffin should be viewed in silhouette against a gradient backdrop of deep indigo and electric teal. Focus on intricate linework, sharp edges, and decorative patterns resembling astral constellations, smoke trails, and stylized feathers. The central composition must be symmetrical and visually balanced, suitable for a chest print or t-shirt graphic. Use high contrast, crisp vector-like detailing, and glowing ember accents to give the illusion of movement and power. Full body shot, centered, bold, vector graphic, ornamental, clean lines, perfect print resolution.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, grain, noisy, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, poor quality, cropped, disfigured
